hero.subtitle: PHYSICS · MATHEMATICS · CRYPTOGRAPHY · AI · CYBERSECURITY
hero.institution: IPN — School of Physics and Mathematics (ESFM)
hero.description: I research at the intersection of post-quantum cryptography, artificial intelligence, and cybersecurity. Mathematical physicist by training, software engineer by vocation. Seeking my first formal opportunity to apply frontier science to real-world problems.

p1.desc: Project developed during undergrad at ESFM — IPN. Foundation for future research in applied cryptography.

p2.title: Post-quantum protocol
p2.desc: Quantum-resistant scheme based on lattice cryptography.

p3.title: AI in cybersecurity
p3.desc: Network anomaly detection using deep learning models.

e1.desc: Specialized in evaluation and optimization of AI models and LLMs, performing error analysis, adversarial testing, prompt engineering and multimodal system validation to improve quality and robustness metrics.

e2.role: Natural Language Processing Researcher — Social Service
e2.desc: Support in NLP projects through data preprocessing, exploratory analysis, dataset preparation, machine learning model evaluation and experiment documentation.

e3.desc: Roles of interest: security engineer, applied researcher, data scientist, academic position in cryptography or AI.
